name: Spinach Gnocci
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound Fresh Spinach Cooked & Drained & Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the spinach and puree it in a food processor. Put the puree into a saucepan and dry over low heat for about one minute. Remove from the heat.
2. In a bowl, mix together the mozzarella, flour, grated parmesan, beaten eggs, and spinach. Season with pepper and nutmeg. If the mixture is too soft, refrigerate it for about 30 minutes to firm up.
3. Roll heaped teaspoons of the mixture in a little flour. This can be done ahead of time.
4. To cook the gnocchi, preheat the oven to low heat to keep the gnocchi warm as they are ready. Half-fill a large saucepan with lightly salted water and bring just to a boil.
5. Drop 6-8 gnocchi into the water and let them simmer gently for about 5-10 minutes, until they float to the surface.
6. Make sure the water does not get beyond a bare simmer, and remove the gnocchi as soon as they are ready; otherwise, they may fall apart.
7. Drain the gnocchi well and place them in a warmed serving dish. Dot with a little butter and keep warm while cooking another batch.
8. When all the gnocchi are done, sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
